@sigil v0 hybrid
G: header∧auth∧risk
H: drop_hdr("x-user-id")∧keep_401
P: spoof_denied∧authz_bypass
V: verify∧review
A: 401∧bypass

[AUDIT]
Goal: header and auth and risk.
Hypothesis: drop the header path("x-user-id") and keep 401 behavior.
Plan: spoofed requests denied and authorization bypass.
Verify: verify and review.
Answer target: 401 and bypass.
